title: The Locust evolution experience
description: A horror modpack that adds Doctor Nowhere's creatures. At the moment, there is The Locust and Follower. Adds random events that can happen at any time.
body:
you will be alone in silence
Doctor Nowhere modpack
This modpack not only adds entities, but also slightly changes minecraft so that it can be scary. Makes the player alone in the game - mobs (nothing at all, not even monsters) will no longer appear, and there will always be fog. The player will walk around the world alone and occasionally strange creepy events will occur - the lights will turn off, unpleasant sounds will be heard. In the caves, their own unique events will occur. Also, sometimes two monsters will appear, that you can strongly doubt that there are no other creatures in this quiet world.

mods:
doctor nowhere mod
befall
essentials
server-side horror
the boiled one (reimagined)
and more...!
